---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to workflow, UI, scanning, or restore behavior
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the feature you want.

## Problem it solves

What is difficult or unclear today.

## Suggested behavior

Describe the expected workflow or UI.

## Scope notes

If this affects quick scan, deep scan, directory restore, or packaging, say so clearly.
